content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT d.*
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

WITH haus_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM J09D_temp
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN (SELECT eq_count FROM haus_counts hc WHERE hc.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END;

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp_enriched;
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp_enriched AS
SELECT 
  t.HAUS,
  t.ANLAGE,
  t.ME_MA_ID,
  t.EQUNR,
  t.HOUSE_NUM1,
  t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09D_temp_enriched
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024'
  INTERSECT
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023'
);

UPDATE J09D_temp_enriched
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024'
  INTERSECT
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023'
)
AND ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING';

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp_enriched AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09D_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp_enriched WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp_enriched WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp_enriched WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL')

- Sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Exported `J09D_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`

- Exported `J09D.csv`
- Sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary tables
